name: Canopy Credit Repair
description_short: Canopy Credit Repair is a credit repair provider based in Houston, Texas. Rated 4.7/5 with 25 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Canopy Credit Repair is a credit repair provider serving clients in Houston, Texas. Carrying a 4.7/5.0 Google rating from 25 reviews, Canopy Credit Repair has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Houston area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Canopy Credit Repair specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in Houston, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Canopy Credit Repair operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Houston, Texas area who are considering Canopy Credit Repair should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
